niveus.title: Niveus Solutions
responsibilities: Developed and deployed scalable backend services using Node.js on Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
Designed and managed RESTful APIs, implementing secure authentication (JWT/OAuth) and optimizing response times.
Implemented cloud-native solutions using Google Cloud Run / Google App Engine for containerized and serverless deployments.
Maintained MySQL databases hosted on Cloud SQL, performing query optimization, indexing, and schema design to improve performance.
Monitored application logs and performance metrics using Cloud Monitoring, reducing production issues and improving uptime.
Containerized applications using Docker, creating efficient images and managing environment configurations.
Deployed and managed containerized workloads on Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE), handling pod deployments, services, and auto-scaling configurations.

tcs.title: Tata Consultancy Services
responsibilities: Developed and maintained modern, high-performance user interfaces and backend using ReactJS, NodeJS, Redux, JavaScript, and SCSS with a focus on modular, scalable code architecture.
Created react components to dynamically render UI objects based on backend response replacing conventional methods to improve performance and code reusability
Worked on designing as well as implementation of submodules to add new flows in the application.
Implemented responsive design techniques to ensure applications are reusable on various devices.
Designed, built, and integrated robust APIs with UIs to deliver seamless end-to-end features and functionality.
Developed RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express to manage server-side logic and integrate Fineos data—widely used in life, accident, and health insurance—for seamless frontend–backend communication.

Worked closely with cross-functional teams in Agile processes, managing tasks and collaboration efficiently using Azure DevOps and implemented CI/CD pipelines to automate build and deployment in Azure DevOps.
Provided defect support to identify and fix critical production issues and bugs, improving user experience.
Ensured all application features comply with ADA standards and are fully accessible.
Utilized testing frameworks and tools to automate testing processes and optimized Sonar test coverage to 85% utilizing Jest and other frameworks.
